Name: Genderbent Dialogue
Author: knst0
Description: Lore-friendly NPC genderbend (data only). Rewrites the in-game gender field plus gendered dialogue, events, and other NPCs' references to female for English and Russian. No textures — pair with a portrait/sprite mod. Currently Sebastian, Shane, Harvey, Alex, Elliott and Sam; toggle per character in Generic Mod Config Menu. Optional custom names per character (English + Russian by grammatical case) via GMCM.
